tomato.name: Tomato

maintenance_schedule.pruning: Light pruning needed only at start of each season
maintenance_schedule.mulching: Mulch after each watering to lock in moisture

harvesting_plan.method: Hand-pick carefully to avoid bruising
harvesting_plan.storage: Refrigerate immediately after harvest, best within 5-7 days

harvest_indicators: Leaves are vibrant and typical size

common_problems.symptoms: Dark spots on leaves, wilting, yellowing
common_problems.solution: Apply organic fungicide; remove affected leaves immediately

common_problems.symptoms: Stunted growth, brown mushy roots, wilting despite watering
common_problems.solution: Improve drainage, reduce watering frequency, treat with copper fungicide

common_problems.symptoms: Sticky residue on leaves, curling leaves, yellowing
common_problems.solution: Spray neem oil or insecticidal soap; introduce ladybugs as natural predators

maintenance_schedule.mulching: Mulch after each watering to lock in moisture

harvesting_plan.method: Hand-pick carefully to avoid bruising
harvesting_plan.storage: Refrigerate immediately after harvest, best within 5-7 days

harvest_indicators: Leaves are vibrant and typical size

common_problems.symptoms: Dark spots on leaves, wilting, yellowing
common_problems.solution: Apply organic fungicide; remove affected leaves immediately

common_problems.symptoms: Stunted growth, brown mushy roots, wilting despite watering
common_problems.solution: Improve drainage, reduce watering frequency, treat with copper fungicide

common_problems.symptoms: Sticky residue on leaves, curling leaves, yellowing
common_problems.solution: Spray neem oil or insecticidal soap; introduce ladybugs as natural predators
